message:
test(e2e): add comprehensive task management E2E tests (bd-3n2)

Expand E2E test coverage for MCP task management with additional
scenarios covering the full task lifecycle.

New tests:
- workflow_task_polling_until_complete: Poll-based task completion
  waiting, simulating client wait_for_task behavior
- workflow_task_status_transitions: Verify correct state machine
  transitions (pending → running → completed)

These tests ensure robust task management under various conditions
including timeout handling and status polling patterns.

Syncs beads issue tracker.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
